settings.title: Introducing Golden Hour Mini Sessions
settings.excerpt: Twenty minute sessions in the last light of the day, perfect for families who do not want a full shoot.
settings.body:
Not every photo needs two hours and three outfit changes. Sometimes you just want a handful of honest frames of the people you love.

Our new mini sessions run for twenty minutes in the last hour before sunset, at the meadow behind the old mill. You get ten edited images delivered within a week.

What twenty minutes gets you

It is less time than a full shoot, so we keep it simple and let the light do the heavy lifting. We will walk, talk, and catch the real moments rather than working through a long pose list. For a lot of families that turns out to be plenty.

  • Twenty minutes in the soft light just before sunset.
  • Ten edited images, delivered inside a week.
  • One easy location, so no time is lost getting there.

We are holding these on three evenings in June. Spots are limited because there is only so much good light in a day, and we will not rush a session to fit more in.

How to make the most of it

Arrive a few minutes early so the kids can shake off the car ride, and keep outfits simple and comfortable. The short format works best when nobody is fussing with buttons or worrying about a plan.

If you have been meaning to get a current photo of everyone but never found the time for a full sitting, this is the gentle version. Send us a note and we will hold one of the June evenings for you.
